parameters.content:
## STEP 1 - One-Time Setup
**Run this branch ONCE** to load your regulatory PDFs into the In-Memory Vector Store.

**How to use:**
1. Set the file path to your regulatory PDF (GDPR, Municipal Codes, etc.)
2. Click "Test workflow" to execute this branch
3. The regulations are now embedded and searchable

**Note:** In-Memory store resets on n8n restart. For production, switch to Qdrant or PGVector.

assignments.name: status
assignments.value: Regulatory database loaded into In-Memory Vector Store successfully.

parameters.content:
## STEP 2 - Main Compliance Check Workflow
**Trigger:** POST a policy draft PDF to the webhook endpoint.

**Flow:**
1. Upload policy draft PDF via webhook
2. Extract text and detect regulatory keywords
3. Query Vector Store for relevant regulations (GDPR, local codes)
4. Gemini 1.5 Pro analyzes draft vs. regulations
5. Report logged to Google Sheets
6. Email sent to compliance officer

**Webhook URL:** /webhook/compliance-check
**Method:** POST with PDF as binary body

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.status }} - Compliance Report: {{ $json.fileName }} | Risk: {{ $json.riskLevel }} | Score: {{ $json.complianceScore }}%
parameters.message:
=

Regulatory Compliance Sentinel

Automated Compliance Analysis Report

Document Reviewed:{{ $json.fileName }}
Review Date:{{ $json.reportDate }}
Compliance Score:{{ $json.complianceScore }}%
Risk Level:{{ $json.riskLevel }}
Violations Found:{{ $json.violationCount }}
Overall Status:{{ $json.status }}
Keywords Detected:{{ $json.foundKeywords }}

Full Compliance Analysis

{{ $json.fullReport }}
Generated by Regulatory Compliance Sentinel | n8n RAG Workflow | {{ $json.reportDate }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status, complianceScore: $json.complianceScore, riskLevel: $json.riskLevel, violationCount: $json.violationCount, message: "Compliance report generated and sent." }) }}
